summary: Festival System Steps 4-5-6 Testing Complete - Iteration 141. All features verified: Unpredictable AI system for non-player festivals (hidden factors), Cinematic Live Ceremony component with 9 animated phases, Enhanced Player Festivals with max_participants, winner badges, and custom festival leaderboard. Fixed route ordering bug for /custom-festivals/leaderboard endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug - /custom-festivals/leaderboard was defined after /custom-festivals/{festival_id}, causing 'leaderboard' to be matched as festival_id. Moved leaderboard route before the parameterized route.

Step 4 (AI System): announce_winner endpoint correctly implements 3 voting types: player (50% votes + 50% virtual audience), algorithm (pure quality: 50% quality + 35% satisfaction + 15% budget efficiency), ai (hidden factors: hype, viral, rumor, critic bias, random events)

Step 5 (Cinematic Ceremony): CinematicCeremony component exists with 9 phases (intro, presentation, category, nomination, suspense, reveal, prize, transition, finale), framer-motion animations, CSS keyframes injection, chat sidebar

Step 6 (Enhanced Player Festivals): CustomFestivalCreate model includes max_participants (5-50), festival_badges collection for winner badges, leaderboard endpoint returns top_creators and top_winners
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and festival data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Festival System Steps 4-5-6 fully verified. Key findings: 1) 3 official festivals with different voting types: golden_stars (player), spotlight_awards (ai), cinema_excellence (algorithm). 2) announce_winner endpoint has 3 different winner selection algorithms based on voting_type. 3) CinematicCeremony component has 9 animated phases with framer-motion. 4) Custom festivals support max_participants (5-50) and winner badges stored in festival_badges collection. 5) Leaderboard endpoint returns top_creators and top_winners arrays. 6) All 5 tabs working: Festival, Player, Classifica, Premi, Storico. 7) Mobile view (390x844) works correctly.

step_4_ai_system.algorithm_voting: Pure technical quality: quality*0.50 + satisfaction*0.35 + budget_efficiency*0.15
step_4_ai_system.ai_voting: Hidden factors: hype_factor (gauss 0,15), viral_factor (-10,20), rumor_factor (choice), critic_bias (gauss 0,8), event_factor (choice)

endpoints_tested.GET /api/festivals/countdown?language=it: Returns current_state and state_label for each festival
endpoints_tested.GET /api/festivals/{festival_id}/current: Returns edition with categories and nominees (max 5 per category)
endpoints_tested.POST /api/festivals/vote: Works for player festivals, returns vote_weight and votes_remaining_today

ui_features_tested.5_tabs: Festival, Player, Classifica, Premi, Storico - VERIFIED
ui_features_tested.countdown_banners: State badges and voting type badges - VERIFIED
ui_features_tested.festival_cards: Rewards preview (XP, Fame, Money, CinePass) - VERIFIED
ui_features_tested.festival_detail: Categories with nominees and vote buttons - VERIFIED
ui_features_tested.player_tab: 'Crea il Tuo Festival' card with creation cost - VERIFIED

bug_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering - /custom-festivals/leaderboard was defined at line 16958, after /custom-festivals/{festival_id} at line 16548. FastAPI matches routes in order, so 'leaderboard' was being treated as a festival_id parameter.
bug_fixed.fix: Moved leaderboard route definition before the {festival_id} parameterized route
